attacking_style: Initiates pace-lifting before classified climbs rather than on them, forcing early selections. Targets KOM points opportunistically while maintaining primary objectives.
team_tactics: Insufficient data for pattern identification across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Mountain stages with multiple categorized climbs where early tempo control can create selection and KOM points are available.
vulnerability: Early aggressive riding limits late-race recovery options, potentially exposing him in prolonged summit finishes.
key_patterns: Attacks or lifts pace before classified climbs to force selection early (2 instances)
Pursues dual objectives: KOM points and stage wins simultaneously when opportunity exists
Preemptive acceleration strategy rather than reactive climbing style
form_trajectory: unknown: insufficient recent data, 4-year gap between observations limits trajectory assessment
